summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid repeating the adjacent chapter's 'By ...' temporal scaffold, and closed the chapter on the coming hearing week so the transition into the next chapter's time jump lands more cleanly.
edits: Recast the opening from a temporal lead-in to a spatial inventory while preserving the missing-ledger setup.
Removed the dangling immediate follow-up line at the end and refocused the close on the hearing week already taking shape.
